title: athyrium × lantangense
intro: Athyrium × lantangense, a hybrid fern species, is a cross between the Chinese lady fern (Athyrium yokoscense) and the Lady Fern (Athyrium filix-femina). This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Athyrium × lantangense include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its leaves are also used in salads and as a cooking green, showcasing its versatility in various herbal preparations.
